title: Famous Celebrities from St. Louis
content:
St. Louis has produced numerous internationally recognized entertainers and athletes.

CURRENT CELEBRITIES:
- Nelly: Grammy-winning rapper, St. Lunatics, Country Grammar. 3 Grammys, 9 Billboard Awards
- John Goodman: Born in Affton. Roseanne, The Big Lebowski, Raising Arizona. 4-decade career
- Andy Cohen: Real Housewives host, CNN NYE. Clayton High School. 19 Emmy noms, St. Louis Walk of Fame (2023)
- Jayson Tatum: NBA star, Boston Celtics. 2024 championship, 5x All-Star, Olympic gold 2020 & 2024. Supports St. Louis youth
- Jenna Fischer: Pam on The Office. Nerinx Hall High School
- Sterling K. Brown: Emmy/Golden Globe winner from Olivette. This Is Us. Time 100 Most Influential (2018)
- Scott Bakula: Kirkwood native. Quantum Leap, Star Trek: Enterprise
- Jon Hamm: John Burroughs School, lived in Creve Coeur and Normandy. Mad Men. Devoted STL sports fan
- Jenifer Lewis: Born in Kinloch. Fresh Prince, Black-ish, Princess and the Frog. Webster University endowed fund

HISTORIC FIGURES: Josephine Baker, Maya Angelou, Yogi Berra, Tina Turner, Chuck Berry, Vincent Price
